seoTitle: Polk County School Calendar 2027-2028: Holidays, Breaks & PDF
seoDescription: Polk County Public Schools 2027-2028 calendar with Aug 10 first day, May 25 last day, breaks, early dismissal, storm make-up days, PDF and ICS.
calendarNotes: Polk County Public Schools starts the 2027-2028 school year on August 10, 2027 and lists May 25, 2028 as the last day for students with a 150-minute early dismissal. Fall Break runs November 22-26, Winter Break runs December 20-January 4, and Spring Break runs March 13-17. The official calendar lists storm make-up days on November 22, November 23, January 4, and May 25.

calendarFaqs.q: When does Polk County start school in 2027?
calendarFaqs.a: Polk County Public Schools starts school on Tuesday, August 10, 2027.

calendarFaqs.q: When is Polk County Spring Break in 2028?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring Break runs Monday, March 13 through Friday, March 17, 2028.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for Polk County in 2028?
calendarFaqs.a: The last day for students is Thursday, May 25, 2028, with a 150-minute early dismissal.

calendarFaqs.q: Which Polk 2027-2028 dates are storm make-up days?
calendarFaqs.a: The official calendar lists November 22, November 23, January 4, and May 25 as storm make-up days.

yearNumbers.label: Early Dismissals
yearNumbers.detail: Students are dismissed 150 minutes early on ten listed dates.

yearNumbers.label: Storm Make-Up Days
yearNumbers.detail: Listed make-up dates are November 22, November 23, January 4, and May 25.

yearNumbers.label: Spring Break
yearNumbers.detail: Spring Break runs one week earlier than the prior school year.

whatsNew.title: Changes from the 2026-2027 Calendar
content: The first student day moves from August 11 in 2026 to August 10 in 2027.
Spring Break moves from March 15-19 in 2027 to March 13-17 in 2028.
The last student day moves from May 27 in 2027 to May 25 in 2028.
